name: Yes Bank Marquee Credit Card

fees.waiverCondition: Spend ₹3,00,000 or more in the previous year

categoryRates.description: 5X Reward Points on dining and entertainment spends
2 Reward Points per ₹100 on all other purchases

pros: Good 5X rewards on dining and entertainment
Decent lounge access with 8 domestic + 2 international
Reasonable annual fee for a premium card
cons: Yes Bank's brand perception has been impacted in recent years
Foreign currency markup of 3% is on the higher side
idealFor: Yes Bank customers looking for a premium lifestyle card
Frequent diners who can leverage 5X rewards on dining

faqs.question: Is Yes Bank stable now?
faqs.answer: Yes, after the RBI-led restructuring in 2020, Yes Bank has stabilized operations and continues to function as a normal scheduled commercial bank with deposit insurance protection.

faqs.question: How many lounge visits are included?
faqs.answer: You get 8 complimentary domestic and 2 international lounge visits per year via Visa / Dreamfolks.

faqs.question: Is the annual fee waivable?
faqs.answer: Yes, the ₹2,500 annual fee is waived on spending ₹3,00,000 or more in the previous year.
